hero.locationBadge: Community platform · South 24 Parganas, West Bengal
typewriter: Digitizing community needs in West Bengal…
Matching the right volunteer to every task…
Turning paper reports into real action…
From flood relief to food distribution…

howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps. Real community impact.

steps.title: Citizen Reports
steps.desc: Community members submit problems via a simple mobile form — water, food, medical, shelter. No tech expertise needed.

steps.title: NGO Reviews
steps.desc: Partner NGOs review, verify and prioritise reports using our urgency scoring system. Critical tasks surface immediately.

steps.title: Volunteer Dispatched
steps.desc: AI matches best-fit volunteers by skill, proximity and availability. Tasks get assigned in minutes, not days.

cards.title: Contamination Relief
cards.story: When tap water turned brown in Budge Budge, SevakNet connected a plumbing volunteer within hours. 340 families had clean water by Sunday.

cards.title: Post-Flood Distribution
cards.story: After Cyclone Remal flooded Maheshtala, 12 volunteers coordinated emergency rations for 900 displaced residents in under 4 hours.

cards.title: Mobile Medical Camp
cards.story: For 60 elderly residents in Pujali without transport, SevakNet organised a mobile medical camp right in their neighbourhood.

cta.title: Ready to make a difference?
cta.subtitle: Join {{count}}+ volunteers already serving communities across West Bengal.

footer.desc: From community voices to volunteer action. Digitizing grassroots social work across West Bengal.
footer.bottom: Built for West Bengal. Built for India. 🇮🇳 · Made with ❤️ for community impact

citizenPortal.title: Report a Community Problem
citizenPortal.sub: Your report reaches NGO partners within minutes.

form.name: Your Name *
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what is happening, how many people are affected, how long this has been going on…

submitted.title: Report Submitted!
submitted.sub: Our NGO partners will review and act on your report shortly.

track.title: Track Your Report
track.sub: Enter your phone number to check report status.
track.notFound: No reports found for this number.

auth.ngoSub: Sign in to your NGO dashboard
auth.ngoRegisterSub: Join {{count}} NGOs already on the platform
auth.skillsSub: Select all that apply — you can change later.
auth.availabilitySub: Select your regular free time slots.
auth.locationSub: We use this to match you with nearby tasks.
auth.successSub: You're now part of {{count}}+ volunteers making a difference in West Bengal.
auth.quote: Every report is a community's voice. Every assignment is your answer.
auth.joinMovementDesc: SevakNet helps NGOs manage community needs with precision — volunteer matching, task tracking, and real-time reporting.
